data.name: LOVE³ -愛立方-
data.detailed_description:
這是Steam版。

◆作品特徵



  • 本作品是一部視覺小說，主要講述主人公和三個女孩子的同居生活。
  • 主旨是「女孩子害羞的樣子最可愛」。
  • 使用Live2D動畫技術，石惠老師的畫會動起來、搖起來！
  • 適配多種語言，可以同時顯示兩種語言。

◆劇情概要



綴木壹成是位一直闖不出名氣的成人漫畫家。
當房租都付不起的壹成正打算放棄漫畫家這條路時，一向對他十分照顧又溺愛有加的責任編輯大姊姊「東坊城聖」給他介紹了一個機會，叫他去給成人漫畫界的大師當助手。
壹成決定要背水一戰，於是接受了這份工作。出乎意料的是，這位大師竟然是壹成的青梅竹馬，是那個跟他約好了要一起實現漫畫家夢想的「志鷹伊織」！
不僅如此，伊織的另一位助手還是當紅同人作家，同時也是壹成在高中時在漫研社裡指導過的學妹「天羽和花」。
突如其來的重逢讓四人又驚又喜。與此同時神明聽取了眾人的願望，把他們的「緣分」連接了起來。這讓三位女主角再也無法抑制住心中對壹成的滿滿愛意。
壹成的職業生涯迎來轉機，突如其來的同居生活也拉開了序幕——

◆製作人員



  • 企劃/製作：Sayori
  • 原畫/彩色：石惠
  • ＳＤ原畫：Sayori
  • 劇本：雪仁
  • 音樂：POPHOLIC

◆角色介紹




志鷹 伊織
CV：葉山モモ

「外表看似冷靜沉著，其實是個不擅長掩飾自己、動不動就臉紅的青梅竹馬」

職業成人漫畫家。作品十分暢銷，名氣在業內屈指可數。
小時候跟壹成約好了要一起實現成為漫畫家的夢想，現在也在為這個目標不斷努力，結果不知不覺間成了成人漫畫家。即使如此，她仍然堅信只要堅持畫漫畫，就總有一天會跟壹成重逢。
一個人工作的時候需要經常換內褲，這讓她有些煩惱。




天羽 和花
CV：わらび茶々

「外表看起甜美可爱魅力四射，其实是个专情又直率的学妹」

同人界某個超有名大型社團的同人作家。壹成高中時代的學妹，兩人也曾是漫研社僅存的兩位成員。
雖然沒在壹成畢業前說出自己的心意，但她相信只要繼續畫漫畫就能跟壹成重逢。她下定決心磨練自己，讓外表土氣的自己變得更有女性魅力。
開始創作的契機是某魔法少女動畫中女主角被敵人折磨的場景。別看她外表甜美可愛，其實內心有異于常人的一面。




東坊城 聖
CV：花園めい

「活力過人、心胸寬廣的大姊姊」

壹成跟伊織的責任編輯。由於從小就練習柔道，她養成了爽快直率的性格。
壹成是聖負責的第一個作家，她在對壹成傾注心力的過程中也漸漸被他吸引。面對他的時候就像個大姊姊一樣，時而嚴厲時而溺愛。
聖在黑心公司上班薪水又低，就算領了收據也不給她報銷，她經常為此哭訴。

data.short_description: 窮困潦倒的成人漫畫家“綴木壹成”被奇妙的緣分所指引，先後邂逅了頗有大姊姊風範的漫畫編輯“東坊城聖”，成人漫畫界的大師同時也是青梅竹馬的“志鷹伊織”，還有熱門同人作家同時也是漫研社的學妹“天羽和花”。壹成的職業生涯迎來轉機，突如其來的同居生活也拉開了序幕——
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280 x 720
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Intel Core2Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280 x 720
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

data.name: LOVE³ -Love Cube-
data.detailed_description:
This is Steam version.

◆Overview



  • A visual novel depicting the protagonist living with three women.
  • Centers around "bashful face is the cutiest thing".
  • Fully animated with Live2D. IshiKei's illustrations will come to life and bounce up and down!
  • Support multiple languages. Two languages can be displayed simultaneously.

◆Story



Things are looking grim for down-on-his-luck adult comics artist, Ichinari Tsuzurigi.

He's struggling to even afford his meager rent, and is seriously considering giving up on his dream, until... His editor, Akira Higashibojo, who's always looking out for him, offers him a position as an assistant to one of the top dogs in the adult comics industry!

Thinking of it as a last hurrah, Ichinari accepts. Lo and behold, said top dog turns out to be none other than Ichinari's childhood friend, Iori Shitaka, with whom he made a childhood promise to become manga artists together.

Also working as an assistant is dojinshi artist of the moment Nodoka Amabane. Ichinari was her Senpai in manga club during high school, and taught her how to draw.

Shocked but elated at this unexpected reunion, they discover that a certain god has taken an interest in their wishes and blessed them with interconnecting "Fates" that will forever change the course of their life.

And so Ichinari finds himself working on sexy manga while living with a group of women whose burgeoning feelings can't be ignored...

◆Staff



  • Planning/Production: Sayori
  • Illustration: IshiKei
  • SD Illustration: Sayori
  • Plot: Yukihito
  • Music: POPHOLIC

◆Characters




Iori Shitaka
CV：Momo Hayama

"A childhood friend that may look like the calm and collected type, but in reality she's easy to make blush."

Ultra-popular and one of the most famous adult manga artists in the industry. As childhood friends, she and Ichinari made a promise to pursue their dreams to become manga artists. She continued to work her hardest, with that promise and those feelings in the back of her mind, and before she knew it...she was drawing erotic manga?! Still, believing that if she continues drawing manga she'll one day be reunited with Ichinari, she pours her heart and soul into her porn. Sometimes she worries about the number of pairs of panties she gets through when she's working alone...




Nodoka Amabane
CV：Chacha Warabi

"A sweet yet sexy vixen on the outside, but inside she's pure, innocent (?) and hopelessly devoted to her Senpai."

A manga artist in one of the most popular dojinshi circles in the fan comics world. Ichinari was her Senpai and the only other member in their high school's manga club. He graduated before she could work up the courage to confess her feelings to him, but she's kept drawing manga to this day in the hope that she would meet him again. She was always a diamond in the rough, but she's now polished up nicely. Her path to drawing dojin was opened up to her by a scene in a magical girl anime where the heroine was tormented by the enemy, and behind her sweet outward appearance lies hidden - and kinky - depths!




Akira Higashibojo
CV：Mei Hanazono

"This powerful woman isn't to be trifled with, but as Ichinari's Onee-chan she tends to let him get away with almost anything."

Ichinari and Iori's editor. Being super into judo, she's never afraid to be blunt and get straight to the point. Ichinari was her first client, and she soon found herself falling for him. She's got that big sister vibe to her and, although she can come down on him harshly, mostly she's putty in Ichinari's hands. Her company never refund her expenses, and she's always crying about her meager salary and terrible working conditions.

data.short_description: Things are about to change for Ichinari Tsuzurigi, an adult comics artist living in poverty. Blessed by his "Fates", he is facing a turning point of his career, and three women are going to live together with him...
data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7/8.1/10
  • Processor: 1.8 GHz Pentium 4
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 1280 x 720
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 7/8.1/10
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Intel Core2Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 1280 x 720
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
